title: Redstone Lamp  Link
description: A Plugin to Control a Redstone Lamp with a Button without a Redstone Wire
body:
This plugin is used to connect Buttons with Redstone Lamps and Copper Bulbs without a Redstone line. Currently, all heads and pressure plates can be used.

Commands:

/lamplink linkbutton <name> # To connect the button
/lamplink linklamp <name> # To connect the lamps
/lamplink list # To see all existing lamp groups
/lamplink list <name> # To see all lamps and buttons of the respective name
/lamplink reloadmapping # To reload the mapping of the buttons and lamps Manuel


Please note that Redstone lamps are currently not allowed to be placed directly next to each other
